complete_user_guide/features/variations..替代料是指同一元件位置上，被系统认可的多种合法外观形态。当检测流程将某一外观实际: An **Alternative Component** (variation) is one of several acceptable physical appearances at the same component position. When the inspection misclassifies an appearance-OK component as NG, the operator can mark it as a variation on the review page so that the system accepts the same appearance on subsequent inspections. Typical scenario: the same designator now carries parts from a different package or a different vendor, but the existing training images don't yet cover the new appearance.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..替代料与主元件共享同一元件位置，在模板编辑器中以独立行显示，可单独查看其特征。创: Alternative components share the same designator as their primary component; they appear as separate rows in the Template Editor so their features can be inspected on their own. After creating a variation you must retrain the model before it takes effect in subsequent inspections.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..在复检页面选中误判为 NG 的元件后，点击 **...** → **设置为替代料: On the Review page, select the falsely-flagged NG component, then click **...** → **Set as Alternative** to open the **Add as Alternative** dialog (``review.setAsAlternativeChoiceTitle``).
complete_user_guide/features/variations..选择 **沿用当前元件图像** 后，对话框进入第二步，显示批量同步选项。操作员可: Selecting **Keep current component image** advances the dialog to its second step, which surfaces the fan-out (bulk-sync) options. Choose one:
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**料号输入框 + 保存按钮** ：修改该替代料组的料号，点击保存后将更新所有共: **Part No. input + Save**: change the variation group's part number. Saving updates every related component sharing that PN.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**封装号输入框 + 保存按钮** ：修改该替代料组的封装号，点击保存后将更新所: **Package No. input + Save**: change the variation group's package number. Saving updates every related component sharing that package.
complete_user_guide/features/variations..**批量同步只能选择一种范围（料号或封装号，二选一或不选）。** 若同一元件的料: **Fan-out scope is single-select** — by part number, by package number, or none. If the matching field is empty on the component, the corresponding sync option is disabled.
